title: How to Watch Every Match of the 2026 FIFA World Cup

blocks.content: https://editorial.rottentomatoes.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/World_Cup_2026_Viewing_Guide-Header.jpg?w=700

The2026 FIFA World Cup is set to take place from Thursday, June 11 to Sunday, July 19 across the United States, Mexico, and Canada on many different channels and streaming services. It can be a lot for a sports fan to navigate. Rotten Tomatoes is here to help with a guide to matches whose winners will go on to the next rounds.

Broadcasts on Fox, FS1, FoxOne (streaming), and Tubi (streaming) will be in English, while Telemundo, Universo, Peacock (streaming), and the Telemundo App (streaming) will be in Spanish. Times are given in ET for consistency.
Stream the World Cup on:Tubi (English) | FoxOne (English) | Peacock (Spanish) | Telemundo App (Spanish)
